questions.question: Describe the difference between a process and a thread in an operating system. Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the key characteristics of both processes and threads.

questions.question: Explain the concept of context switching in process scheduling. What are the advantages and disadvantages of context switching?
questions.hint: Consider the CPU overhead, process scheduling algorithms, and system performance.

questions.question: A process has a priority of 3. What is the probability that the process will be executed before a process with a priority of 2 in a First-Come-First-Served (FCFS) scheduling algorithm?
questions.hint: Use the FCFS scheduling rule to determine the probability.
